terms.title: Terms of service
terms.subtitle: User agreement
terms.defaultHtml:
1. Agreement

By registering and using TaskMall you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

2. Account

You must provide accurate information when registering. You are responsible for keeping your credentials secure and for all activity under your account.

3. Use of service

You agree to use the platform only for lawful purposes. Tasks, deposits and withdrawals are subject to our rules and limits. We may suspend or terminate accounts for violations.

4. Changes

We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

5. Contact

For questions about these terms please contact our customer service.
privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.subtitle: How we handle your information
privacy.defaultHtml:
1. Information we collect

We collect information you provide when registering (e.g. username) and data generated when using the service (e.g. task and transaction data). No personal data such as email or phone is required for basic registration.

2. How we use it

We use your information to operate the platform, process tasks and withdrawals, and improve our services. We do not sell your data to third parties.

3. Security

We take reasonable measures to protect your account and transaction data. You are responsible for keeping your password secure.

4. Your rights

You may request access to data we hold. For account or data requests please contact support.

5. Updates

We may update this policy from time to time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

6. Contact

For privacy questions please contact our customer service.
risk.title: Risk disclaimer
risk.subtitle: Please read carefully
risk.defaultHtml:
Important: TaskMall is a task-based earning platform. Please use the service responsibly and only with funds you can afford to use.

1. Tasks & balance

Task amounts are deducted from your balance when an order is confirmed. Principal and commission are returned after task completion. Ensure you have sufficient balance and understand the process.

2. Withdrawals

Withdrawals are subject to platform rules, limits and review. Processing times may vary. You are responsible for providing a correct wallet address.

3. No guarantee

We do not guarantee any particular returns or outcomes. Task availability and commission rates may change. Use at your own discretion.

4. Compliance

You must comply with local laws. If your jurisdiction restricts or prohibits such services, do not use TaskMall.

5. Contact

For questions about risks or processes please contact our customer service.
